name: lara
subtitle: A customization toolbox that utilizes DarkSword.

apps.name: lara
apps.subtitle: This is the regular release build for lara.
apps.localizedDescription:
lara is a customization toolbox that utilizes DarkSword. Supports iOS 16.0 - iOS 18.7.1 & iOS 26.0.x, excluding M5 and A19.
For more information, check out our [GitHub](https://github.com/rooootdev/lara). Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/gw8PcRF3Jr) if you need any help!

apps.name: lara (Nightly)
apps.subtitle: This is the nightly testing build for lara. Only use this if you're interested in new features and do not care about stability.
apps.localizedDescription:
lara is a customization toolbox that utilizes DarkSword. Supports iOS 16.0 - iOS 18.7.1 & iOS 26.0.x, excluding M5 and A19.
For more information, check out our [GitHub](https://github.com/rooootdev/lara). Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/gw8PcRF3Jr) if you'd like to report any bugs!
